title: Change exit code to 1 on podman rmi nosuch image
body:
Make it easy for scripts to determine if an image removal
failure.   If only errors were no such image exit with 1
versus 125.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: you are changing behaviour here for rmi which is why the tests are failing ...
